name: X-Golf Brighton
about: X-Golf Brighton offers a high-tech indoor golf experience using advanced camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors to provide accurate and realistic simulations. The venue operates on a pay-per-bay-hour model, with each simulator accommodating up to six players. It features a full bar and restaurant, making it suitable for social events, corporate outings, and casual play. The facility is equipped with seven simulators, including a private VIP bay known as The Gilmore Bay, and offers golf lessons provided by PGA-certified instructors.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art simulator technology with unparalleled accuracy
Flexible private VIP bay for groups and special events
Full bar and food menu available on-site
PGA-certified coaching and lessons for skill improvement

food_and_drink.notes: Full food menu with shareable bites, appetizers, snacks, and pizzas.
Full bar with 8 beer taps, cocktails, and wines available.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rentals are available if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted. The venue has a full bar and kitchen on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It generally takes about 1 hour per individual to play 18 holes. For groups, allow 1 hour per player.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, X-Golf Brighton welcomes children of all ages.
